search_campaign: BASECAMP 1906 ACC Camp Reconstruction - MLP Wheeler Plates Harvest
target: Arthur Oliver Wheeler's photo-topographic plates, Yoho/Field area, 1898-1910

mountain_legacy_project.findings: MLP main site operational with blog, projects, and news. 33 posts mentioning Wheeler found in WordPress search. 13 research projects indexed. No dedicated Yoho/Field project found.

mlp_explorer.findings: Map-based image search tool appears to be down or requires special access. Connection refused.

mlp_image_analysis_toolkit.findings: Interactive toolkit for comparing historic and repeat photo pairs. No direct image download capability detected.

uvic_dspace.findings: University of Victoria institutional repository. DSpace and REST APIs blocked for automated access.

library_archives_canada.findings: LAC collection search interface is HTML-based requiring browser interaction. No API-based JSON/XML export available for automated harvesting. OAI-PMH endpoints not responding.

borealis_data.findings: Open data repository reported offline or network unreachable.

mlp_projects_identified.title: In his Footsteps: Repeating a Classic J.J. McArthur Station
mlp_projects_identified.relevance: McArthur contemporary of Wheeler; may contain related survey station methodology

mlp_projects_identified.title: Focus on Ice and Snow
mlp_projects_identified.relevance: Glacial imagery; Yoho Pass area has Wapta Icefield - relevant for glacier change documentation

mlp_projects_identified.title: IAT: Station locations and data
mlp_projects_identified.relevance: Contains metadata for surveyed stations; likely includes Wheeler's survey points

mlp_projects_identified.title: New Natures
mlp_projects_identified.relevance: Historical landscape photography with repeat imagery

access_challenges: MLP Explorer image database (main search tool) offline or requires authentication
DSpace institutional API blocks automated queries
LAC SRU/OAI-PMH endpoints not functional for phototopographic plates
No bulk download CSV/JSON metadata export available
MLP does not publish a public catalog of Wheeler's plates with direct image URLs
Individual images accessible through LAC and UVic but require manual browsing

direct_contact.reason: Request direct access to Wheeler 1904-1910 Yoho/Field plates metadata and images

specific_requests: Metadata CSV/JSON for Wheeler's Dominion Land Survey plates in Yoho/Field area
Station numbers and locations: Yoho Pass, Emerald Lake, Summit Lake, Wapta Icefield, Burgess Pass, Mount Stephen, Takakkaw Falls
Direct image URLs or download links for digitized glass plates
Accompanying repeat photographs from MLP field campaigns (2000s-2020s)
Map references and topographic map associations for each plate
alternative_approach: Search Library and Archives Canada collection manually at https://recherche-collection-search.bac-lac.gc.ca/
Filter by date range 1898-1910 and collection: 'Dominion Land Survey'
Request archival access to original glass plates if digitization incomplete
supplementary_sources: Alpine Club of Canada Archives (may have Wheeler expedition records, 1906 camp documentation)
Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies (M series holdings - architectural and mountain photography)
Canadian Geological Survey historical records (Wheeler was also involved in geological surveys)
1906/1907 Canadian Alpine Journal volumes (ACC camp records, expedition photos, climbing routes)

status_summary: MLP's digitized Wheeler collection exists but is not currently accessible via automated API harvesting. Primary archive (explorer.mountainlegacy.ca) offline. Direct institutional contact required to obtain plate metadata and image URLs. Library and Archives Canada holds the source materials but requires manual search interface navigation.
next_steps: Email MLP director with specific request for Wheeler Yoho/Field 1904-1910 metadata
Contact Library and Archives Canada Reference Services for batch metadata export
Explore LAC's manual collection search for Wheeler plates with location keywords
Cross-reference 1906 Alpine Club of Canada records with MLP Wheeler station data
Download any available plates from LAC web interface and catalog locally
